patches.summary: Added hand-written Zotero item workflow commands under internal/cli.
patches.reason: The generated CLI omitted annotation, full-text, recent-item, duplicate, identifier lookup, and collection move workflows requested for this local tree.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass; items help lists the new commands.

patches.validated_outcome: go fmt ./..., go build ./..., and go vet ./... pass; help output lists the new commands.

patches.summary: Fixed correctness/security defects surfaced by glean review missions: AdaptiveLimiter.Wait pacing race, `items get` provenance always counting 0, ResolveByName json_extract field-name injection guard, maskToken short-token exposure, dead OAuth token-refresh path (Zotero is API-key auth), and concurrency-aware sync progress (\r garble under parallel workers).
patches.reason: glean static-audit/security-audit missions found real bugs in generated infrastructure files. Fixed in-repo per the local patch protocol. The Wait race, provenance count, and maskToken are SYSTEMIC (affect every printed CLI) and should be pushed upstream to cli-printing-press; the token-refresh removal is Zotero-specific (no OAuth endpoint).
patches.validated_outcome: go build/vet pass; new regression tests TestAdaptiveLimiterWaitConcurrentPacing (also under -race), TestCountResultItems, TestIsSafeJSONFieldName, TestMaskToken pass. Verified false positives left unchanged: SQL multi-statement read-only bypass (empirically: db.Query runs one statement and mode=ro blocks writes) and global cache invalidation (documented opaque-key design).

patches.summary: Added unit-test coverage for five previously-untested generated modules flagged by glean test-gaps findings: HTTP client (do/retry/cache/sanitize/cacheKey), sync (pagination/cursor-stuck/maxPages/single-object/access-warning + pure helpers), CLI helpers (error classification/filtering/formatting/pagination), search (extractSearchResults shapes + live-filter + local fallback), and doctor (interstitial detection/fail-on policy/cache report).
patches.reason: glean test-gaps missions (beads pg9a, rf41, bnt5, f6yb, hcaq) flagged P0/P1 untested logic. Tests use real httptest servers, real store.Open temp DBs, and temp dirs (no mocks) and exercise real branch behavior.
patches.validated_outcome: 32 new test functions; go build/vet and full `go test ./...` pass (fresh, -count=1).
